assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements under IFRS.
An intragroup dividend has been declared and a receivable/payable has been recognised.
The risk being considered is foreign currency risk on that recognised monetary balance or related cash flow.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IFRS 9 hedge accounting guidance, including hedged items in consolidated financial statements and the specific treatment of intragroup monetary items and forecast intragroup transactions for foreign currency risk.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes the general IFRS 9 model under which gains and losses on derivatives and many financial instruments are recognised in profit or loss when hedge accounting is not applied.
